Domestic Box Office $238,679,850Details

Worldwide Box Office $789,300,444
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $56,524,257

Total $132,131,182

Legs:2.45 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 24th, 2013 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: May 17th, 2013 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
June 6th, 2013 (Wide) (Australia)
May 27th, 2021 (Wide) (New Zealand)
May 11th, 2023 (Limited) (Australia)

Running Time: 130 minutes
Franchise: Fast and the Furious
Cast, crew, or production detail: Archival Footage of Previous Installment, Inbetwequel, Intertitle, Prequel, Scene in End Credits, Sequels With Returning Stars, Voiceover/Narration

Filming location (country): England, Spain, United Kingdom, United States
Geographical setting: London, Los Angeles, Russia

Genre:Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
